name: i18n-swarm
description: Deterministic localization agent for English-only Vue 3 apps: extracts UI strings, wires vue-i18n, generates locale files, rewires components, and self-verifies that the app still builds and tests stay green.
author: greymoth

scripts.selfcheck: node test/selfcheck.ts && node test/selfcheck-jsx.ts && node test/selfcheck-report.ts
